narrative:
category_one_description: New Horizon Community School seeks proposals for scalable broadband Internet access services to support current and projected bandwidth demand for digital learning, cloud-based applications, and online assessments. Solutions may include one or more service connections necessary to meet performance, capacity, and instructional network requirements. Vendors may propose service options ranging from 1 Gbps to 10 Gbps or equivalent scalable solutions.All proposals and vendor communications regarding this FCC Form 470 can be submitted directly to the schools IT Director at:ealexandre@nhccschool.orgVendors are responsible for monitoring this Form 470 and submitting complete proposals prior to the close of the competitive bidding period.
service_type: Data Transmission and/or Internet Access
service_category: Category 1
function: Internet Access and Data Transmission Service
minimum_capacity: 1024.00 Mbps
maximum_capacity: 10240.00 Mbps
installation_initial: True
form_nickname: NEW HORIZON COMMUNITY SCHOOL FY 2026 C1
